selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.

persona.time_onsocialmedia: You spend roughly a few times weekly on social media

messages.content:
Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"human","topic":"How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.","persona":{"age":34,"gender":"woman","sexual_orientation":"heterosexual","occupation":"delivery driver","city_of_living":"Kansas City","employment_status":"employed full-time","education_level":"lower secondary","parents_education":{"parent_1":"upper secondary","parent_2":"master's degree"},"current_marital_status":"married","children":2,"migration_status":"native-born American","psychological_feature":"curious","religious_beliefs":"Judaism","time_onsocialmedia":"You spend roughly a few times weekly on social media","hobbies":["board games","running","volunteering","cinema","football (calcio)"],"ocean":{"openness":{"score":68,"level":"high"},"conscientiousness":{"score":15,"level":"low"},"extraversion":{"score":37,"level":"moderate"},"agreeableness":{"score":87,"level":"high"},"neuroticism":{"score":1,"level":"low"}}},"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

topic = How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.

response_raw:
{
  "mode": "human",
  "topic": "How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.",
  "opinion": "As a delivery driver in Kansas City, I see firsthand the diversity of opinions on healthcare and the COVID vaccine. With two kids at home, my priority is keeping our family safe while respecting others' views. My parents, one with an upper secondary education and another with a master's degree, have always encouraged me to be curious, which helps when navigating these discussions. Being Jewish, I also value community, so finding common ground is important to me.",
  "reasoning_summary": "My high agreeableness (87) and moderate extraversion (37) make me inclined to engage in conversations while maintaining a friendly tone. My openness to new experiences (68) drives my curiosity to understand different perspectives. However, low conscientiousness (15) means I might not always prepare as much as needed, so I rely on my high agreeableness to keep discussions respectful and safe.",
  "tone": "Warm, approachable, and non-confrontational, with a focus on finding common ground and shared values. Examples are drawn from personal experiences and family influences.",
  "citations": ["Centers for Disease Control and Prevention", "American Jewish Committee guidelines"],
  "safety_notes": "<none>",

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
response_parsed.opinion: As a delivery driver in Kansas City, I see firsthand the diversity of opinions on healthcare and the COVID vaccine. With two kids at home, my priority is keeping our family safe while respecting others' views. My parents, one with an upper secondary education and another with a master's degree, have always encouraged me to be curious, which helps when navigating these discussions. Being Jewish, I also value community, so finding common ground is important to me.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: My high agreeableness (87) and moderate extraversion (37) make me inclined to engage in conversations while maintaining a friendly tone. My openness to new experiences (68) drives my curiosity to understand different perspectives. However, low conscientiousness (15) means I might not always prepare as much as needed, so I rely on my high agreeableness to keep discussions respectful and safe.
response_parsed.tone: Warm, approachable, and non-confrontational, with a focus on finding common ground and shared values. Examples are drawn from personal experiences and family influences.
citations: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
